emailSystem.description: Component-based email template system with RightSteps branding
architecture: Reusable components (header, footer, button, info box)

auth: Welcome Email - Generic welcome for new users
OTP Email - Email verification code (10 min expiry)
Reset Password Email - Password reset link (1 hour expiry)
Email Updated - Email change notification (sent to both old and new)
Email Verified - Email verification success confirmation
profile: Parent Welcome - Parent profile completion welcome
Tutor Submitted - Tutor profile submitted for verification
Tutor Approved - Tutor profile approved by admin
Tutor Changes Requested - Admin requests profile changes
Tutor Rejected - Tutor profile rejected by admin
Speech Therapist Submitted - Speech therapist profile submitted for verification
Speech Therapist Approved - Speech therapist profile approved by admin
Speech Therapist Changes Requested - Admin requests profile changes
Speech Therapist Rejected - Speech therapist profile rejected by admin
Child Psychologist Submitted - Child psychologist profile submitted for verification
Child Psychologist Approved - Child psychologist profile approved by admin
Child Psychologist Changes Requested - Admin requests profile changes
Child Psychologist Rejected - Child psychologist profile rejected by admin
Career Counselor Submitted - Career counselor profile submitted for verification
Career Counselor Approved - Career counselor profile approved by admin
Career Counselor Changes Requested - Admin requests profile changes
Career Counselor Rejected - Career counselor profile rejected by admin
Occupational Therapist Submitted - Occupational therapist profile submitted for verification
Occupational Therapist Approved - Occupational therapist profile approved by admin
Occupational Therapist Changes Requested - Admin requests profile changes
Occupational Therapist Rejected - Occupational therapist profile rejected by admin
Social Skills Coach Submitted - Social skills coach profile submitted for verification
Social Skills Coach Approved - Social skills coach profile approved by admin
Social Skills Coach Changes Requested - Admin requests profile changes
Social Skills Coach Rejected - Social skills coach profile rejected by admin
SEN Practitioner Submitted - SEN practitioner profile submitted for verification
SEN Practitioner Approved - SEN practitioner profile approved by admin
SEN Practitioner Changes Requested - Admin requests profile changes
SEN Practitioner Rejected - SEN practitioner profile rejected by admin
